Empower your financial journey.

Practical, plain-English advice on tax, compliance and running a business in South Africa — straight from our team.

10 August 2025

What is provisional tax?

When people hear "provisional tax" they often think it's an extra tax. Good news — it isn't. Here's what it really is, who needs to pay it, and how to avoid penalties.

Read more 5 August 2025

Shareholders, directors — and why share certificates matter

Shareholder, director, share certificate — three terms every company owner meets early on. Here's what they actually mean and why they matter for your business.

Read more 23 July 2025

What is a director's loan? (And why SARS cares)

A director's loan is money moving between you and your company outside of salary or dividends. Handled carelessly, it can trigger unwanted tax — here's what to watch for.

Read more 13 January 2025

Embrace cloud accounting for your business

Cloud accounting has become a game-changer for modern businesses — real-time data, less admin and better decisions. Here's why it matters and how to get started.
